name: nyyon-lite
description: The nyyon-lite plugin: a light, layered discipline (gateway -> tool -> workflow -> module -> knowledge) for building systems with AI, plus one slash command per layer.

plugins.name: nyyon-lite
plugins.description: Methodology plus copy-paste templates for building and extending a system in five layers: gateway -> tool -> workflow -> module -> knowledge. Ships the nyyon-lite skill and the /nyyon-* slash commands.
